name: Digital Multimeter 600V DC/AC 10A DC
description: Most popular and highest selling budget digital multimeter. Proven for its quality, reliability and economy. Superior quality pocket-friendly size with Blue backlight. 3½ Digits (2000 Counts), Manual Ranging, 600 V AC/DC, 200 µA–10 A DC, 200 Ω–2 MΩ Resistance. Diode & Continuity Test with Data Hold and Transistor (hFE) test. Holster with stand included.

name: True RMS Digital Multimeter
description: Pocket-friendly, high-quality True RMS Digital Multimeter. 600 V AC/DC, 20 µA–10 A DC, 200 Ω–200 MΩ Resistance. Diode, Transistor (hFE) & Continuity Test, Data Hold, HD Display with backlight (2000 Counts). NCV, Flashlight, Auto Power Off, Double Fuse protection and Shockproof design with holster. Built using high-quality components for unparalleled reliability.

name: Full Function Digital Multimeter True RMS
description: True RMS Digital Multimeter — 3½ Digits, Manual Ranging, 1000/750 V DC/AC, 10 A AC/DC, 20 MΩ Resistance. Continuity test, Diode, Transistor (hFE), Capacitance, Auto Power Off and Live wire test.

name: Digital Multimeter True RMS Auto Ranging
description: New-generation handy-size feature-packed True RMS Digital Multimeter. 6000 Counts HD Display, 600 V DC/AC, 600 µA–10 A AC/DC, 60 MΩ Resistance. NCV, Flashlight, Relative measurement, Frequency measurement in ACV range, Capacitance 10 nF–2 mF, Temperature −20 ºC–1000 ºC, Frequency up to 2 MHz, Duty Cycle. Data Hold, Auto Power Off, Shockproof design.

name: Smart Digital Multimeter True RMS Auto Ranging
description: Fully automatic Smart Digital Multimeter with Intelligent mode. 6000 Counts HD Display with Primary & Secondary Display and Analog bar graph. 600 V AC/DC, 10 A AC/DC, True RMS. Capacitance, Frequency and Temperature Test. Diode & Continuity Test, NCV, Torch, Auto Power Off, Data Hold, Low Battery indicator, Jack Prompt, Burnt Fuse Prompt. With Holster.

name: Digital Multimeter True RMS 1000V DC / 750V AC 20A
description: New-generation rugged True RMS digital multimeter. 200 mV–1000 V DC, 2 V–750 V AC, 200 µA–20 A DC/AC. 2000 Counts HD Display with backlight, NCV, Torch, Heavy-duty shockproof construction. Double Fuse overload protection, high stability and precision. Capacitance 6 nF–20 mF, Resistance 200 Ω–20 MΩ. Data Hold, Auto Power Off, Relative measurement, Low Battery indicator.

name: Digital Multimeter True RMS Auto Ranging 1000V DC / 750V AC 10A
description: Highly reliable, feature-packed True RMS Digital Multimeter. 3¾ Digits, 4000 Counts HD Display, 1000/750 V DC/AC, 10 A DC/AC. NCV, Flashlight, Double Fuse Overload Protection, CAT III 1000 V / CAT IV 600 V. Duty Cycle, Frequency in ACV range, Relative measurement, Transistor (hFE) test, Capacitance 6 nF–100 mF, Temperature −20 ºC–1000 ºC, Frequency up to 20 MHz, Resistance 400 Ω–40 MΩ. Shockproof construction.

name: LCR Digital Multimeter True RMS 1000V DC / 750V AC 20A
description: New-generation Heavy Duty Handheld Digital LCR Meter and Multimeter. 3½ Digits, True RMS, Manual Ranging, 1000/750 V DC/AC, 20 A AC/DC, 200 MΩ Resistance. Inductance 2 mH–20 H, Capacitance 20 nF–2 mF (Auto Ranging). Transistor test (hFE), Frequency/D-Cycle up to 20 MHz, Temperature test, Shockproof construction. Flashlight, Data Hold, Low Battery indicator, Auto Power Off.

name: Full Function Digital Multimeter True RMS 1000V AC/DC 20A
description: Heavy Duty full-function True RMS Digital Multimeter. 3½ Digits, Manual Ranging, Auto Power Off, 1000 V & 20 A AC/DC. Mains Frequency Measurement in 1000 V AC range. Capacitance & Frequency Auto Range Measurement, Temperature Measurement, LCD Backlight & Torch. Transistor (hFE), Diode & Continuity Test. Live Wire Testing & NCV with Audio/Visual indication.

name: True RMS Digital Multimeter 20000 Counts
description: 4½ Digit flagship True RMS multimeter with 20000 Counts display and Backlight. 1000/750 V DC/AC, 200 µA–20 A DC/AC, 200 Ω–20 MΩ Resistance, 20 nF–2 mF Capacitance, 200 Hz–2 MHz Frequency. Conductance Test, Transistor and Diode Tests, Continuity, Torch. Superior quality, Heavy Duty ergonomic design.

name: Bench Top Digital Multimeter with PC Interface TRMS 30000 Counts
description: Portable Bench Top True RMS Digital Multimeter with PC Interface and Rechargeable Battery (Type-C USB Charging). 4⅗ Digits (30000 Counts), 3.5" TFT Dual Display, Auto Ranging. 1000 V DC, 750 V AC, 300 µA–10 A AC/DC, 300 MΩ Resistance. Frequency up to 30 MHz, Duty Cycle, Capacitance, Temperature, dBm, Data Record, Math, Max/Min, Relative measurement. Continuity & Diode Test, Data Hold.

name: V/mA Calibrator
description: Superior quality Voltage and Milliamp V/mA Calibrator with Source and Measure functions. 4½ Digits, DC mA / DCV: 0–24 mA / 0–10 V. 0.015% DC mA / 0.02% DCV Accuracy. High precision and reliability.
